name: crossing_approach
promptSpec:
Process crossing_approach(train_dist, gate_pos, fault) -> (cmd, alarm)

FSF specification:
if (fault gt 0) => cmd eq 0 && alarm eq 2
if (train_dist le 3 && gate_pos ge 2) => cmd eq 2 && alarm eq 1
if (train_dist le 3 && gate_pos eq 1) => cmd eq 1 && alarm eq 1
if (train_dist ge 8 && gate_pos eq 0) => cmd eq 3 && alarm eq 0
others => cmd eq 0 && alarm eq 0

externalProvenance.section: Railway crossing controller industrial trial (Mitsubishi); FSF reconstruction of approach/clear/fault priority

name: crossing_clear_check

fsfScenarios.test: occupancy eq 0 && gate_pos eq 0 && timer ge 2

promptSpec:
Process crossing_clear_check(occupancy, gate_pos, timer) -> (permit, status)

FSF specification:
if (occupancy gt 0) => permit eq 0 && status eq 2
if (gate_pos gt 0) => permit eq 0 && status eq 1
if (timer lt 2) => permit eq 0 && status eq 1
if (occupancy eq 0 && gate_pos eq 0 && timer ge 2) => permit eq 1 && status eq 0
others => permit eq 0 && status eq 0

externalProvenance.section: Clearance permit under occupancy/gate/timer constraints

name: route_lock

fsfScenarios.test: route_req gt 0 && conflict eq 0 && point_ok gt 0

promptSpec:
Process route_lock(route_req, conflict, point_ok) -> (locked, reject)

FSF specification:
if (conflict gt 0) => locked eq 0 && reject eq 2
if (point_ok eq 0) => locked eq 0 && reject eq 1
if (route_req gt 0 && conflict eq 0 && point_ok gt 0) => locked eq 1 && reject eq 0
others => locked eq 0 && reject eq 0

externalProvenance.section: Casco interlocking route-lock decision (published SOFL case); conflict preempts lock

name: signal_aspect
promptSpec:
Process signal_aspect(route_locked, block_clear, override) -> (aspect, restrict)

FSF specification:
if (override gt 0) => aspect eq 0 && restrict eq 1
if (route_locked eq 0) => aspect eq 0 && restrict eq 1
if (route_locked gt 0 && block_clear eq 0) => aspect eq 1 && restrict eq 1
if (route_locked gt 0 && block_clear gt 0) => aspect eq 2 && restrict eq 0
others => aspect eq 0 && restrict eq 0

externalProvenance.section: Signal aspect selection under lock/block/override priority

name: point_move_permit

fsfScenarios.test: cmd gt 0 && locked eq 0 && occupied eq 0

promptSpec:
Process point_move_permit(locked, occupied, cmd) -> (move, deny)

FSF specification:
if (locked gt 0) => move eq 0 && deny eq 2
if (occupied gt 0) => move eq 0 && deny eq 1
if (cmd gt 0 && locked eq 0 && occupied eq 0) => move eq 1 && deny eq 0
others => move eq 0 && deny eq 0

externalProvenance.section: Point (switch) move permit; lock/occupancy preempt command

name: atm_auth

fsfScenarios.test: pin_ok gt 0 && card_ok gt 0 && tries lt 3

promptSpec:
Process atm_auth(pin_ok, card_ok, tries) -> (auth, retain)

FSF specification:
if (card_ok eq 0) => auth eq 0 && retain eq 1
if (tries ge 3) => auth eq 0 && retain eq 1
if (pin_ok eq 0) => auth eq 0 && retain eq 0
if (pin_ok gt 0 && card_ok gt 0 && tries lt 3) => auth eq 1 && retain eq 0
others => auth eq 0 && retain eq 0

externalProvenance.section: ATM authentication FSF (book industrial example pattern)

name: atm_withdraw_pilot

fsfScenarios.test: auth gt 0 && amount gt 0 && amount le balance

promptSpec:
Process atm_withdraw_pilot(auth, balance, amount) -> (cash, status)

FSF specification:
if (auth eq 0) => cash eq 0 && status eq 2
if (amount le 0) => cash eq 0 && status eq 1
if (amount gt balance) => cash eq 0 && status eq 1
if (auth gt 0 && amount gt 0 && amount le balance) => cash eq 1 && status eq 0
others => cash eq 0 && status eq 0

externalProvenance.section: ATM withdraw under auth/balance guards

name: hotel_book

fsfScenarios.test: vip gt 0 && rooms gt 0 && nights gt 0

promptSpec:
Process hotel_book(rooms, nights, vip) -> (booked, rate)

FSF specification:
if (rooms le 0) => booked eq 0 && rate eq 0
if (nights le 0) => booked eq 0 && rate eq 0
if (vip gt 0 && rooms gt 0 && nights gt 0) => booked eq 1 && rate eq 1
if (rooms gt 0 && nights gt 0) => booked eq 1 && rate eq 2
others => booked eq 0 && rate eq 0

externalProvenance.section: Hotel reservation SOFL application (Liu research applications list)

name: transfer_guard

fsfScenarios.test: amount gt 0 && amount le balance && amount le daily_left

promptSpec:
Process transfer_guard(balance, amount, daily_left) -> (ok, reason)

FSF specification:
if (amount le 0) => ok eq 0 && reason eq 1
if (amount gt balance) => ok eq 0 && reason eq 2
if (amount gt daily_left) => ok eq 0 && reason eq 3
if (amount gt 0 && amount le balance && amount le daily_left) => ok eq 1 && reason eq 0
others => ok eq 0 && reason eq 0

externalProvenance.section: Online banking transfer guards (published SOFL modelling case)

name: fraud_hold
promptSpec:
Process fraud_hold(risk, amount, new_device) -> (hold, challenge)

FSF specification:
if (risk ge 8) => hold eq 1 && challenge eq 2
if (new_device gt 0 && amount ge 5) => hold eq 1 && challenge eq 1
if (risk ge 5 && amount ge 8) => hold eq 1 && challenge eq 1
if (risk lt 5) => hold eq 0 && challenge eq 0
others => hold eq 0 && challenge eq 0

externalProvenance.section: Fraud hold priority over routine transfer clearance

name: atm_deposit

fsfScenarios.test: auth gt 0 && amount gt 0 && amount le cap

promptSpec:
Process atm_deposit(auth, amount, cap) -> (ok, status)

FSF specification:
if (auth eq 0) => ok eq 0 && status eq 2
if (amount le 0) => ok eq 0 && status eq 1
if (amount gt cap) => ok eq 0 && status eq 1
if (auth gt 0 && amount gt 0 && amount le cap) => ok eq 1 && status eq 0
others => ok eq 0 && status eq 0

externalProvenance.section: Agile-SOFL ATM deposit constraints (public teaching/industrial example; amount cap mirrors published JPY limits scaled to ints)

name: atm_transfer

fsfScenarios.test: auth gt 0 && amount gt 0 && amount le balance && amount le xfer_cap

promptSpec:
Process atm_transfer(auth, balance, amount, xfer_cap) -> (ok, reason)

FSF specification:
if (auth eq 0) => ok eq 0 && reason eq 4
if (amount le 0) => ok eq 0 && reason eq 1
if (amount gt balance) => ok eq 0 && reason eq 2
if (amount gt xfer_cap) => ok eq 0 && reason eq 3
if (auth gt 0 && amount gt 0 && amount le balance && amount le xfer_cap) => ok eq 1 && reason eq 0
others => ok eq 0 && reason eq 0

externalProvenance.section: ATM/online transfer under auth/balance/cap (Agile-SOFL ATM transfer function; desensitized)

name: atm_inquire
promptSpec:
Process atm_inquire(auth, account_ok) -> (show, deny)

FSF specification:
if (auth eq 0) => show eq 0 && deny eq 1
if (account_ok eq 0) => show eq 0 && deny eq 1
if (auth gt 0 && account_ok gt 0) => show eq 1 && deny eq 0
others => show eq 0 && deny eq 0

externalProvenance.section: ATM balance inquire; auth and account validity first

name: daily_withdraw_cap

fsfScenarios.test: auth gt 0 && amount gt 0 && amount le remaining

promptSpec:
Process daily_withdraw_cap(auth, amount, remaining) -> (cash, status)

FSF specification:
if (auth eq 0) => cash eq 0 && status eq 2
if (amount le 0) => cash eq 0 && status eq 1
if (amount gt remaining) => cash eq 0 && status eq 3
if (auth gt 0 && amount gt 0 && amount le remaining) => cash eq 1 && status eq 0
others => cash eq 0 && status eq 0

externalProvenance.section: Daily withdrawal remaining-cap check (Agile-SOFL constraint 3.1 family; remaining = cap - used, desensitized)

name: route_conflict_check

fsfScenarios.test: req_a gt 0 && req_b gt 0 && share_plat gt 0

promptSpec:
Process route_conflict_check(req_a, req_b, share_plat) -> (conflict, allow)

FSF specification:
if (req_a gt 0 && req_b gt 0 && share_plat gt 0) => conflict eq 1 && allow eq 0
if (req_a gt 0 && req_b eq 0) => conflict eq 0 && allow eq 1
if (req_b gt 0 && req_a eq 0) => conflict eq 0 && allow eq 1
others => conflict eq 0 && allow eq 0

externalProvenance.section: Conflicting routes sharing platform (industrial interlocking pattern; cf. published compositional interlocking examples)

name: flank_protect

fsfScenarios.test: route_set gt 0 && flank_clear gt 0 && override eq 0

promptSpec:
Process flank_protect(route_set, flank_clear, override) -> (proceed, block)

FSF specification:
if (override gt 0) => proceed eq 0 && block eq 2
if (route_set eq 0) => proceed eq 0 && block eq 1
if (flank_clear eq 0) => proceed eq 0 && block eq 1
if (route_set gt 0 && flank_clear gt 0 && override eq 0) => proceed eq 1 && block eq 0
others => proceed eq 0 && block eq 0

externalProvenance.section: Flank protection gate before proceed (desensitized from public interlocking-table literature; SOFL-shaped FSF)

name: approach_lock
promptSpec:
Process approach_lock(train_app, signal_clear, timer) -> (locked, release)

FSF specification:
if (train_app gt 0 && signal_clear gt 0) => locked eq 1 && release eq 0
if (train_app gt 0 && timer lt 3) => locked eq 1 && release eq 0
if (train_app eq 0 && timer ge 3) => locked eq 0 && release eq 1
others => locked eq 0 && release eq 0

externalProvenance.section: Approach locking / timed release (railway crossing + interlocking public patterns)

name: signal_clear_permit

fsfScenarios.test: route_ok gt 0 && track_clear gt 0 && fault eq 0

promptSpec:
Process signal_clear_permit(route_ok, track_clear, fault) -> (clear, restrict)

FSF specification:
if (fault gt 0) => clear eq 0 && restrict eq 2
if (route_ok eq 0) => clear eq 0 && restrict eq 1
if (track_clear eq 0) => clear eq 0 && restrict eq 1
if (route_ok gt 0 && track_clear gt 0 && fault eq 0) => clear eq 1 && restrict eq 0
others => clear eq 0 && restrict eq 0

externalProvenance.section: Signal clear only when route+track OK and no fault

name: library_borrow

fsfScenarios.test: member_ok gt 0 && overdue eq 0 && copies gt 0

promptSpec:
Process library_borrow(member_ok, copies, overdue) -> (loan, deny)

FSF specification:
if (member_ok eq 0) => loan eq 0 && deny eq 2
if (overdue gt 0) => loan eq 0 && deny eq 1
if (copies le 0) => loan eq 0 && deny eq 1
if (member_ok gt 0 && overdue eq 0 && copies gt 0) => loan eq 1 && deny eq 0
others => loan eq 0 && deny eq 0

externalProvenance.section: Library borrow process (SOFL book industrial teaching case)

name: library_return
promptSpec:
Process library_return(loan_active, days_late) -> (closed, fine)

FSF specification:
if (loan_active eq 0) => closed eq 0 && fine eq 0
if (days_late gt 0) => closed eq 1 && fine eq 1
if (loan_active gt 0 && days_late eq 0) => closed eq 1 && fine eq 0
others => closed eq 0 && fine eq 0

externalProvenance.section: Library return with late fine priority

name: water_tank_control
promptSpec:
Process water_tank_control(level, inflow, alarm) -> (valve, pump)

FSF specification:
if (alarm gt 0) => valve eq 0 && pump eq 0
if (level ge 9) => valve eq 0 && pump eq 0
if (level le 2) => valve eq 1 && pump eq 1
if (level gt 2 && level lt 9) => valve eq 1 && pump eq 0
others => valve eq 0 && pump eq 0

externalProvenance.section: Water-tank / process-control SOFL example (alarm preempts)

name: hotel_checkout

fsfScenarios.test: occupied gt 0 && paid gt 0 && damage eq 0

promptSpec:
Process hotel_checkout(occupied, paid, damage) -> (release, bill)

FSF specification:
if (occupied eq 0) => release eq 0 && bill eq 0
if (paid eq 0) => release eq 0 && bill eq 2
if (damage gt 0) => release eq 0 && bill eq 1
if (occupied gt 0 && paid gt 0 && damage eq 0) => release eq 1 && bill eq 0
others => release eq 0 && bill eq 0

externalProvenance.section: Hotel checkout release under payment/damage guards

name: access_badge

fsfScenarios.test: badge_ok gt 0 && time_ok gt 0 && zone lt 3

promptSpec:
Process access_badge(badge_ok, zone, time_ok) -> (open, alarm)

FSF specification:
if (badge_ok eq 0) => open eq 0 && alarm eq 2
if (time_ok eq 0) => open eq 0 && alarm eq 1
if (zone ge 3 && badge_ok gt 0) => open eq 0 && alarm eq 1
if (badge_ok gt 0 && time_ok gt 0 && zone lt 3) => open eq 1 && alarm eq 0
others => open eq 0 && alarm eq 0

externalProvenance.section: Physical access control ordered guards (IET SOFL fault-prevention industrial modelling style)

name: med_dose_check

fsfScenarios.test: allergy eq 0 && dose gt 0 && dose le weight

promptSpec:
Process med_dose_check(weight, dose, allergy) -> (approve, flag)

FSF specification:
if (allergy gt 0) => approve eq 0 && flag eq 2
if (dose le 0) => approve eq 0 && flag eq 1
if (dose gt weight) => approve eq 0 && flag eq 1
if (allergy eq 0 && dose gt 0 && dose le weight) => approve eq 1 && flag eq 0
others => approve eq 0 && flag eq 0

externalProvenance.section: Medication dose safety checks (published SOFL healthcare modelling pattern; desensitized units)

name: power_trip_protect
promptSpec:
Process power_trip_protect(current, temp, manual) -> (trip, warn)

FSF specification:
if (manual gt 0) => trip eq 1 && warn eq 2
if (current ge 9) => trip eq 1 && warn eq 2
if (temp ge 8) => trip eq 1 && warn eq 1
if (current lt 9 && temp lt 8) => trip eq 0 && warn eq 0
others => trip eq 0 && warn eq 0

externalProvenance.section: Power protection trip priority (industrial control FSF)

name: traffic_signal_priority
promptSpec:
Process traffic_signal_priority(emergency, ped, phase) -> (light, hold)

FSF specification:
if (emergency gt 0) => light eq 0 && hold eq 2
if (ped gt 0 && phase eq 1) => light eq 1 && hold eq 1
if (phase eq 2) => light eq 2 && hold eq 0
if (phase eq 0) => light eq 0 && hold eq 0
others => light eq 0 && hold eq 0

externalProvenance.section: Traffic signal priority with emergency preempt (SOFL-style ordered scenarios)

name: insurance_claim_triage

fsfScenarios.test: fraud_score lt 8 && docs_ok gt 0 && amount lt 9

promptSpec:
Process insurance_claim_triage(fraud_score, amount, docs_ok) -> (pay, review)

FSF specification:
if (fraud_score ge 8) => pay eq 0 && review eq 2
if (docs_ok eq 0) => pay eq 0 && review eq 1
if (amount ge 9) => pay eq 0 && review eq 1
if (fraud_score lt 8 && docs_ok gt 0 && amount lt 9) => pay eq 1 && review eq 0
others => pay eq 0 && review eq 0

externalProvenance.section: Insurance claim triage with fraud preempt (IET-style requirements fault-prevention modelling)

name: inventory_reorder
promptSpec:
Process inventory_reorder(stock, reorder_pt, on_order) -> (order, qty)

FSF specification:
if (on_order gt 0) => order eq 0 && qty eq 0
if (stock le reorder_pt) => order eq 1 && qty eq 2
if (stock gt reorder_pt) => order eq 0 && qty eq 0
others => order eq 0 && qty eq 0

externalProvenance.section: Inventory reorder decision (SOFL book / teaching industrial case)
